t_ch: 当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
t_en: Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!

t_ch: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

t_ch: …我刚才是…怎么了？
t_en: ...What got into me just now?

t_ch: 嘿，他好像变正常了——太好了！你成功了！
t_en: Hey, he seems normal now. That's wonderful! You did it!

t_ch: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
t_en: I saw a dial and got it moving.

t_ch: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
t_en: Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!

t_ch: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
t_en: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

t_ch: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然冷静下来呢？
t_en: It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he suddenly be all calm and composed like this?

t_ch: 我刚才…不会是想要和那位小姐打一架吧？我疯了吗？
t_en: Was I... about to get into a fight with that lady? Was I crazy?

t_ch: 老大这是怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong with boss?

t_ch: 哎，不好意思，请教您一个问题——是您让我冷静下来的吗？我有点发昏……
t_en: Hey, may I ask you a question? Were you the one who made me simmer down earlier? I wasn't my normal self..

t_ch: 别客气，应该的。
t_en: It's the least I can do.

t_ch: 好吧，谢谢您。要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
t_en: Thanks for doing that. If we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.

t_ch: 我的天啊，你变得好有礼貌。
t_en: Wow, you've become so well-mannered.

t_ch: 嗐，毕竟要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
t_en: We owe it to you — if we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.

t_ch: 实在抱歉啊，给各位添麻烦了…唉，我这火气怎么就突然往上涌了呢？真是莫名其妙……
t_en: I'm so sorry for stirring up all this trouble... Alas, why did I get so worked up all of a sudden? It's baffling...

t_ch: 噢，灰色的朋友！你一定要告诉他，是石头老板干的好事！
t_en: Oh, my gray friend! You have to tell him that {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#} is behind this!

t_ch: 人总有情绪失控的时候。
t_en: Everyone loses it once in a while.

t_ch: 嗐，让各位来宾看笑话了…真是不好意思。
t_en: This is embarrassing... I feel bad for causing such a spectacle.

t_ch: 也许因为我们都在梦里吧。
t_en: Perhaps, it's because we're all in a dream.

t_ch: 哈哈，这也不失为一种原因。
t_en: Haha, that can be one of the reasons.

t_ch: 是石头老板干的，想不到吧？
t_en: It's Boss Stone's doing. Can you believe it?

t_ch: 石头老板？呃，我没明白您的意思……
t_en: Stone? Um, I'm not sure I get what you mean...

t_ch: 不管怎么样，我得给各位好好赔礼道歉才是——小的们，给我列队！好好向贵客们道歉！
t_en: Anyway, I owe everyone a proper apology. Gang, line up and say sorry to our honored guests!

t_ch: 是、是！
t_en: S—Sure!

t_ch: 预备——起！
t_en: Ready... Go!

t_ch: <size=36>给您添麻烦了！非常抱歉！</size>
t_en: <size=36>We're truly sorry for the trouble we caused!</size>

t_ch: 噢，天哪——他们看起来可真诚恳。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
t_en: Wow, they look really sincere. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?

t_ch: 谢谢你们的好意…
t_en: I appreciate the gesture...

t_ch: …但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
t_en: ...But, can we have some privacy, please?

t_ch: 当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
t_en: Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!

t_ch: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

t_ch: …呜…呜呜呜……
噢，我的天啊！是你把他弄哭了吗？
t_en: Oh, goodness! Did you make him cry?

t_ch: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
t_en: I saw a dial and got it moving.

t_ch: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
t_en: Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!

t_ch: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
t_en: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

t_ch: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会哭成这个样子呢？
t_en: It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he be in tears all of a sudden?

t_ch: 呜呜…呜呜呜……
老大这是怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong with boss?

t_ch: 噢，他的样子可真让人伤心，就连美梦小镇的守护者也快要哭出来啦。
t_en: Oh, he's crying so hard. Even I, the guardian of the Dreamville, am nearly moved to tears.

t_ch: 你怎么了？为什么这么伤心？
t_en: What's wrong sweetie? Why are you feeling so down?

t_ch: 呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
t_en: *sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...

t_ch: 哥们，别哭了，多大个人了。
t_en: Bruh, quit the waterworks. You're a big boy now.

t_ch: 呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
t_en: *sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...

t_ch: 我可真是个大恶人。
t_en: Oh dear me, ain't I a big bad meanie for making you sob like a crybaby?

t_ch: 呜呜…这不是您的错，我只是…突然想起了我母星的老妈……
t_en: *sob*... It isn't your fault. I just suddenly... thought about my mother on my home planet...

t_ch: 我们现在该怎么办？
t_en: What do we do now?

t_ch: 噢，天哪——他们简直要乱套了。不过，现在是不是个让他们离开的好机会？
t_en: Woah, things are turning into a mess. But then again, maybe now is a good chance to ask them to leave?

t_ch: 朋友，您要不然…
t_en: My friend, why don't you go and...

t_ch: …找个地方静一静？
t_en: How about you get some alone time somewhere?

t_ch: 呜呜…您说的是……
t_en: *sob*... You're right...

t_ch: 呜…小的们，都给我散了…让我一个人静静……
t_en: *sob*... Gang, you are dismissed... I need to be alone for a while...

t_ch: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

t_ch: 我们又见面了，客人！是你帮我们化解了危机吗？
t_en: We meet again! Are you the one who helped settle everything down here?

t_ch: 米沙，怎么了？你认识这位灰色的朋友吗？
t_en: Misha, are you acquainted with this gray friend of mine?

t_ch: {M#他}{F#她}是尊贵的客人——前不久我们成为了朋友。我跟你提起过，记得吗？
t_en: {M#He}{F#She}'s an esteemed guest whom I've befriended recently. I told you about {M#him}{F#her} before. Does it ring a bell?

t_ch: 噢，原来就是{M#他}{F#她}！
t_en: Oh, it's {M#him}{F#her}!

t_ch: 总之，谢谢你！如果你没有及时赶到，这里就要乱作一团了……
t_en: Anyway, thanks a lot! If you hadn't gotten here in time, I would have been in a real mess...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。真没想到这么快就再会了。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm surprised we get to see each other again so soon.

t_ch: 不客气，应该的。
t_en: No need to thank me. It's the least I can do.

t_ch: 我也没想到这么快。
t_en: I'm surprised too.

t_ch: 方才的混乱…听说是有群假面愚者在街头闹事，扰乱了秩序。我途径此地，受到盘查，过程中发生了一些…误会。就结果而言，又给你添麻烦了。
t_en: About all the commotion just now... I heard a bunch of Masked Fools were causing a ruckus on the streets. I happened to be passing through, got stopped for questioning, and there were some... misunderstandings along the way. Anyway, I owe you another one.

t_ch: 这位小姐…也是你的熟人吗？
t_en: Is this lady... your friend too?

t_ch: 熟人说不上，有过一面之缘，{M#他}{F#她}此前在酒店帮了我，是位善良的人。
t_en: Well, we've only met each other once before. But {M#he}{F#she} is a kind soul for helping me at the hotel.

t_ch: 也很高兴认识你，美丽的小姐。
t_en: It's my pleasure to meet you, beautiful lady.

t_ch: 美、美丽的小姐……
t_en: B—Beautiful lady...

t_ch: 不过，你刚才对那位先生做了什么？他瞬间的情绪变化…有些不可思议。
t_en: By the way, what did you do to that man earlier? It was like someone took him on an emotional roller coaster.

t_ch: 我也想问这个…到底发生了什么？
t_en: I was wondering about that too... What happened back there, exactly?

t_ch: 钟表小子赋予了我钟表把戏。
t_en: Clockie taught me some Clockwork.

t_ch: 没错！就是我，钟表小子！
t_en: That's right! It was me, Clockie!

t_ch: 当然，也多亏了你。如果没有你施展的钟表把戏，美梦小镇可就要陷入麻烦啦！
t_en: Of course, you played a big part too. Without you doing the Clockwork, Dreamville would've been in some real trouble!

t_ch: 是话疗，我用了话疗。
t_en: Talk therapy. I used that on him.

t_ch: 你在说什么！不是话疗，是钟表把戏！
t_en: What're you talking about? It wasn't talk therapy! It was Clockwork!

t_ch: 恐怕没这么简单吧？
t_en: I don't think it's that simple.

t_ch: 我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
t_en: Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?

t_ch: 看到我的球棒会害怕很正常啦。
t_en: It's only natural for people to get intimidated by my baseball bat.

t_ch: 你在说什么！不是球棒，是钟表把戏！
t_en: What're you talking about? It wasn't the baseball bat! It was Clockwork!

t_ch: 恐怕没这么简单吧？
t_en: I don't think it's that simple.

t_ch: 我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
t_en: Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?

t_ch: …钟表小子？
t_en: ...Clockie?

t_ch: 对，就是那个卡通人物…好像出现在了现实——我的意思是——梦境里。
t_en: Yes, that cartoon character. I think he's shown up in reality — I mean — in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 虽然我也没太搞清楚状况…但{NICKNAME}说，似乎只有直率、纯真、有童心的小孩子才能看见它……
t_en: I don't really know how a cartoon character could show up around here, but according to {NICKNAME}, only honest people with childlike innocence can see him...

t_ch: …看来我也已经过了这样的年纪。
t_en: ...It seems like I'm too old to qualify for that.

t_ch: 但倘若这位钟表小子真的存在，许多事就解释得通了。
t_en: If Clockie really exists, that can explain a lot of things.

t_ch: …她走掉了。那，我们也…？
t_en: ...She's gone. Well, shall we?

t_ch: 去忙吧去忙吧，谢谢你，灰色的朋友！
t_en: I'll let you get back to your beeswax. Thanks, my gray friend!

t_ch: 真的非常感谢！果然无名客都是很了不起的人啊…希望我们有缘再见！
t_en: I really appreciate your help! The Nameless are indeed a bunch of talented people... May our paths cross again!

t_ch: 有缘再见，滴答！
t_en: May our paths cross again, tick-tock!

t_ch: 我们到了，就是这里。
t_en: Here we are. This is the place.

t_ch: 好漂亮的咖啡厅。
t_en: This place looks mighty fine.

t_ch: 这里就是秘密据点？
t_en: Is this your secret stronghold?

t_ch: 不，不是……
t_en: No, it isn't...

t_ch: ——是这里。
t_en: ...This is.

t_ch: 好漂亮的窨井盖。
t_en: What a beautiful manhole cover.

t_ch: 这里就是…秘密据点？
t_en: Is this... your secret stronghold?

t_ch: 嗯，「秘密据点」在里面。
t_en: Yes, it's right inside.

t_ch: 「里面」？什么意思？
t_en: Inside? What does that mean?

t_ch: 就是字面意思。
t_en: Just the literal meaning.

t_ch: 你是要我…钻进去？
t_en: Do you want me... to crawl in there?

t_ch: 周围的人还在看着呢…
t_en: This is embarrassing. People are watching us...

t_ch: 没关系的！梦里什么都会发生，每天都有好多人从天上掉下来——行人早都见怪不怪了。
t_en: It doesn't matter! Anything can happen in a dream, and there are lots of people falling from the sky every day. The pedestrians aren't going to be fazed by anything.

t_ch: 我先做个示范——刚开始会有点黑，你要跟紧哦。
t_en: Let me show you how to do it. It's going to be very dark at first, so you'll have to stay close to me.

t_ch: 你听过这首歌吗，《使一颗心免于哀伤》，那位知更鸟的作品。谐乐大典在即，梦境中偶尔也会奏响她的音乐。
t_en: Have you heard of the song? It's called If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking, by Robin. Her songs are played in the dreamland from time to time as the Charmony Festival is drawing close.

t_ch: 这里是离梦中的天空最近的地方，远离城市的喧嚣，也没有筑梦师的争吵。可以不被任何人打扰，感受当下——当下的风景，人，还有梦……
t_en: This spot is the closest place to the sky in the Dreamscape. It's far from the hustle and bustle of the city and free from the bickering among the Dreamweavers. You can feel the moment — the scenery, the people, and the dreams — without being disturbed by anyone...

t_ch: 多美啊…时光永远停驻在这黄金的时刻，一场金色的梦。酒馆的愚者和忆庭的忆者，流浪的游侠和公司的使节，星穹列车的无名客…和我。
t_en: How beautiful... Time is frozen at this golden hour, this golden dream shared by the Fool from the Tavern and the Memokeeper from the Garden of Recollection, the wandering Ranger and the IPC ambassador, the Astral Express Nameless... and me.

t_ch: 所有人在这里平等地睡去，无论缘由，尽管我们确实各怀目的……
t_en: Everyone falls asleep here equally, regardless of our different agendas...

t_ch: …对不起，{NICKNAME}，我的确是一个「偷渡犯」。
t_en: ... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}. I really am a stowaway.

t_ch: 我知道。
t_en: I know.

t_ch: 果然瞒不住你呀。
t_en: I knew I couldn't hide it from you.

t_ch: 我没想到…
t_en: I never saw that coming...

t_ch: 我觉得应该告诉你。
t_en: I think it's only right to tell you.

t_ch: 我的故乡在很久以前就毁灭了，也许是军团干的，也可能是虫群…我是个星际难民，就和匹诺康尼的许多「本地人」一样。
t_en: My hometown was destroyed a long time ago. It was probably the doing of the Legion or the Swarm... I'm an interstellar refugee, just like many of the Penacony locals.

t_ch: 「同谐」包容所有的人，也包括那些远道而来的漂泊者。家族接纳他们，但他们…终究不属于这里。
t_en: The Harmony accepts everyone, including wanderers from afar. The Family takes them in, but they... don't belong here.

t_ch: 在这座金碧辉煌的大都会中，有些人的梦名为匹诺康尼，而有些人的梦…却和现实无异，尽管每一个来到这里的普通人，最初都怀抱着相同的目的。
t_en: In this splendid metropolis, some have a dream called Penacony, but some have dreams... that are no different from reality, even though everyone who comes here harbors the same motive in the beginning.

t_ch: 我也一样。现实里的我有着求而不得的愿望——它太过强烈，因此我诉诸梦境……
t_en: And it's likewise for me. I have a wish I want to achieve so badly in the real world, but I can't. So, I want to give it a shot here...

t_ch: 我能够理解。
t_en: I know the feel.

t_ch: 是什么愿望？
t_en: What's your wish?

t_ch: 不能逃避现实。
t_en: You can't run away from reality.

t_ch: …「失熵症」。你听说过这个词吗？
t_en: Entropy Loss Syndrome. Have you heard of this term?

t_ch: 是一种奇怪的现象。罹患这种病症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离。这意味着你正在慢慢消失，而这种「消失」在旁人眼中甚至难以察觉——
t_en: It's a strange condition. Those suffering from it will experience an irreversible chronic dissociation of their physical structure. This means they will slowly fade away, and the process is barely noticeable to others...

t_ch: 你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……
t_en: You can still run, jump, and talk as usual. Everything seems normal, but then you'll start doing everything slightly slower than others...

t_ch: …然后越来越慢、越来越慢，直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。
t_en: ...And then even slower than that, until the lines between your body and the entire world become blurry. You won't be able to tell reality from dreams because they have all been shattered.

t_ch: 所以，我该如何拒绝呢…你能想象吗？在这场梦里，我竟然可以…可以不用待在冰冷的「医疗舱」里……
t_en: So, how could I possibly resist it... I mean can you imagine? I can actually free myself from this icy medical cabin in this dream...

t_ch: 我可以将医生的话抛在脑后，用我自己的身体，随心所欲地去听、去看、去触碰、去思考、去领会。尽管这个世界并不真实，但这感受却无比珍贵……
t_en: I can forget about all the doctor's advice. I can listen, and see, and touch, and think, and understand whatever I want with my body. So, although this world isn't real, this experience is priceless...

t_ch: …就像此时此刻。
t_en: ...Just like this moment.

t_ch: 对不起。因为一些原因，有些事…我现在还不能向你全盘托出。但也有些事，我应该对你坦诚。
t_en: I'm sorry. For certain reasons, there are things I can't reveal to you yet. But there are also things you should know.

t_ch: 「钟表匠的遗产」固然是我的所求，但我们未必要分道扬镳，走向对立，至少…我不希望这种事发生。
t_en: I am, in fact, after the Watchmaker's Legacy, but that doesn't mean we have to go our separate ways and be enemies. But at least... I hope things won't turn out that way.

t_ch: 我也希望如此。
t_en: I hope so too.

t_ch: …谢谢你。
t_en: ...Thanks.

t_ch: 我无法给予承诺…
t_en: I can't make any promises.

t_ch: …没关系，谢谢你。
t_en: ...It's okay. Thanks.

t_ch: 我不能信任一个有所隐瞒的人。
t_en: I can't put my trust in someone who hides things from me.

t_ch: …我知道，没关系。
t_en: ...I understand, and I'm okay with that.

t_ch: 你究竟是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 我会告诉你的，但…不是现在。
t_en: I'll tell you, but... not now.

t_ch: 「我梦见一片焦土，一株破土而生的新蕊，它迎着朝阳绽放，向我低语呢喃。」
t_en: In my dream, I saw a scorched earth, and a new sapling emerging from it. It bloomed against the morning sun, and whispered to me.

t_ch: 还记得邀请函上的问题吗——生命因何而沉睡？
t_en: I still remember the question on the invitation letter — Why does life slumber?

t_ch: 你看，在这片梦想之地，一切都被允许，一切都有可能。不堪回首的过去像泡沫一样散去，不愿面对的明天永远也不会到来。
t_en: You see, everything is possible in this land of dreams. The nightmarish past will disperse and fade away like bubbles in water, and the future that you don't want to face will never come.

t_ch: 人们为何选择沉睡？我想……
t_en: Why do people choose to sleep? I think...

t_ch: 是因为害怕从「梦」中醒来。
t_en: It is because they're afraid to wake up from the dream.

t_ch: 茄子——！
t_en: Say cheeeese!

t_ch: 来这边——
t_en: Here...

t_ch: 我们就快到了。
t_en: We're almost there.

t_ch: 看，很漂亮的地方，对吧？
t_en: Look! This place is breathtaking, isn't it?

t_ch: 通常，游客是不被允许到这来的，所以我们得小心一点，别被其他人发现了。
t_en: Guests aren't allowed here, so we have to be careful not to get caught.

t_ch: 别担心，不是什么危险地带。你可以把这里理解为黄金时刻的边境，更往外的梦境，家族还在建设改造中。
t_en: Don't worry, this place isn't dangerous. Just think of this as the border of Golden Hour. The Family is still building and remodeling the Dreamscape beyond here.

t_ch: 我的「秘密据点」就在这里面。
t_en: My secret stronghold is in this area.

t_ch: 两位，劳驾。前方是施工重地，闲人免进。
t_en: Excuse me, there's a construction site ahead. Unauthorized personnel are not allowed in.

t_ch: 呀…一上来就被逮到啦。
t_en: Drat... We're caught right away.

t_ch: 可否通融一下。
t_en: Could you let us through just this time?

t_ch: 好吧，那我们回去。
t_en: Fine. We'll head back.

t_ch: 我来吧。
t_en: Let me try.

t_ch: 请您…通融一下吧？我们不会给大家添麻烦的。
t_en: Could you... please make an exception? We're not going to cause any trouble.

t_ch: 不行。上头有规矩，任何非筑梦师团队成员都禁止进入。
t_en: Not a chance. Our boss made it clear that only the Dreamweavers are allowed here.

t_ch: 态度也太强硬了吧……
t_en: He won't budge...

t_ch: 我们认识加拉赫。
t_en: We know Gallagher.

t_ch: 谁？听都没听过。今天就是梦主本人来了，我也不会放你们进去。
t_en: Who? Never heard of him. I wouldn't let you in even if the Dreammaster were here.

t_ch: 这些信用点是一点心意…
t_en: Here are some credits for you...

t_ch: 行了，你收回去。这次我权当没看见，下次再这样我可要通知橡木家系了。
t_en: Get those out of my sight, and I'll pretend nothing happened this time. Try pulling something like that again, and I'll report it to the Oak Family.

t_ch: 求求你了求求你了…
t_en: Pretty please...

t_ch: 每天求我的人可多了，我难道都要通融一下？
t_en: People ask for favors every day. Am I supposed to just say yes to all of them?

t_ch: 两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
t_en: None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.

t_ch: 唔，看来我们是说服不了他了——我再想想办法吧……
t_en: Hmm, seems like he won't give in... Let me think of another way...

t_ch: （也许…可以再用一次钟表把戏？这应该不算「做坏事」吧……）
t_en: (Perhaps... Clockie's Clockwork trick can come in handy? This doesn't count as malicious intent, right...)

t_ch: 眼前的男人十分沉着，看起来毫无破绽——也许你得使些<color=#dbc291ff>「激将法」</color>才行。
t_en: The composed man before you appears impenetrable. Perhaps you need to <color=#dbc291ff>provoke</color> him a bit.

t_ch: 两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
t_en: None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.

t_ch: 尝试洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts.

t_ch: 不打扰你了…
t_en: I'll leave you to it...

t_ch: 感谢您配合「家族」的工作。
t_en: Thank you for your cooperation.

t_ch: 噢，天哪……
t_en: Oh my goodness...

t_ch: 天哪…天哪、天哪、天哪…！
t_en: Oh my... Oh my, oh my, oh my!

t_ch: 朋友，你怎么了？
t_en: Ok, buddy, what's gotten into you?

t_ch: 我现在非常…开心！
t_en: I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!

t_ch: 你变得好怪——这下糟了。
t_en: You're acting weird... This is bad.

t_ch: 糟了？哪里糟了？我现在非常…开心！
t_en: Bad? How so? I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!

t_ch: 天哪天哪天哪…
t_en: Oh my, oh my, oh my...

t_ch: 哈，朋友——你看起来像我一样…开心！
t_en: Ha, buddy. You look... as delighted as me!

t_ch: 你能感受到吗？这种感觉…甚至可以说——有点疯狂！就像连续喝了十瓶元年苏乐达，然后在梦境贩售店狠狠泡上一整天！
t_en: Can you feel it? This is... wild! It feels like I just downed ten bottles of Epochal SoulGlad in one gulp and spent an entire day at the Dreamscape Sales Store!

t_ch: 如果米娅在这儿，我们就能高歌一曲，她一定懂我的感受！
t_en: If Meeya were here, we would sing a song together. I'm sure she would understand how I feel!

t_ch: 我简直要控制不住这种狂热的情绪了…我向你发出邀请，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}——与我跳一支舞吧！现在！此时此刻！就在这里！
t_en: I can hardly contain this palpable excitement... I'd like to invite you to dance with me, {M#handsome}{F#beautiful}. Right here, right now!

t_ch: 和你跳舞就能放我们过去了吗？
t_en: Will you let us in after I dance with you?

t_ch: 噢，当然不能——规矩就是规矩！
t_en: Oh, no way! Rules are rules!

t_ch: 不过，就算您不愿意与我共舞——也没关系！
t_en: It's totally fine if you want to turn me down!

t_ch: 我必须得…婉拒你。
t_en: I have to... say no.

t_ch: 噢，这可真是太糟糕了。但没关系，我依旧狂热！
t_en: Oh, that's a downer... but not for me! I'm still brimming with elation!

t_ch: 我只需要这疯狂的感觉，与扑通乱跳的心…但愿它一直都在！
t_en: This crazy mood and this pounding heart are just what I need... I wish it would last forever!

t_ch: 当然，你们还是不能通过这里——这是我的职责！
t_en: Still, I won't let you guys in, because it's my duty to stop you!

t_ch: 他可真是…太有原则了。
t_en: He really is a man of principle.

t_ch: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

t_ch: 男人变得十分开心，但依旧滴水不漏——也许你得使些「激将法」才行。
t_en: The man has become content but remains impenetrable. Perhaps you need to provoke him a bit.

t_ch: 啊，两位尊贵的客人…欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
t_en: Ah, honored guests... Welcome to Penacony.

t_ch: 我是猎犬家系的成员，负责维持梦境世界的治安——虽然在家族的保护下，梦里根本不会有危险——当然，这也意味着我是多余的，连垃圾桶都不如。
t_en: I'm a member of the Bloodhound Family. My job is maintaining order in the Dreamscape. In fact, no danger will arise under The Family's protection, which makes my job redundant. Even a trashcan is more important than me.

t_ch: 你不必这样妄自菲薄。
t_en: Don't sell yourself short.

t_ch: 噢，抱歉。我只是…情难自禁。
t_en: Oh, sorry about that. I just can't help myself.

t_ch: 没关系，我可以创造危险！
t_en: Well, you're in luck then, for I Am The Danger!

t_ch: 噢，请别。因为我一定制服不了你。
t_en: Please refrain from that. I know I won't be able to overcome you.

t_ch: 没关系，我喜欢垃圾桶。
t_en: But trashcans are important! I like them!

t_ch: 噢，那我会建议您找爱德华医生接受精神分析治疗。
t_en: In that case, I'd recommend that you see Dr. Edward for a psychotherapy session.

t_ch: 总之，请给我一点私人空间吧，尊贵的客人。
t_en: Anyway, please just give me some privacy.

t_ch: 两位大可去好好享受这灯红酒绿的梦境世界，而不是在这里陪我这样一个连垃圾桶都不如的家伙谈心。
t_en: You two should enjoy this fun and exciting Dreamscape, instead of talking to someone who is worse than a trashcan.

t_ch: 那可以请你放我们过去吗？
t_en: Well, can you let us through?

t_ch: 噢，当然不能。
t_en: Oh, no way.

t_ch: 我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
t_en: There's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.

t_ch: 那就请你不要挡我们的道了。
t_en: Well, please stop blocking our way.

t_ch: 噢，很抱歉挡了你们的路。
t_en: Oh, I'm sorry for blocking your way.

t_ch: 但我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
t_en: But there's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.

t_ch: 当然，你们也可以选择强闯过去…但我发誓一定会跟二位拼命——我已经没什么好失去的了……
t_en: Sure enough, you guys can force your way through, but I swear I'll stop you or die trying. After all, I have nothing left to lose...

t_ch: 我感觉自己好有负罪感……
t_en: I feel really bad...

t_ch: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

t_ch: 男人刚才提到了「拼命」…如果你良心还过得去，或许真的可以试试看。
t_en: The man mentioned "die trying"... It might just be worth a try to give him what he wanted. That is, if you can live with it.

t_ch: 我说了多少遍——施工重地，非请勿入！
t_en: How many times do I have to repeat myself? Unauthorized personnel are not allowed at the construction site!

t_ch: 你们两个，一定要在我面前现眼是吗？那别怪我不客气了！
t_en: Do you two really want to stay here and test my patience? You're going to regret it!

t_ch: 来啊，比划比划！
t_en: Come on! Let's fight!

t_ch: 哈，这可是你自找的！但你可别太嚣张——像你这种人，我见过太多了！
t_en: You're asking for it! And I wouldn't be so cocky if I were you — I deal with punks like you all the time!

t_ch: 我不是这个意思…
t_en: That's not what I mean...

t_ch: 别想狡辩——你这种人我见过太多了！
t_en: Don't try talking back to me. I deal with punks like you all the time!

t_ch: 仗着自己年轻有活力，天不怕地不怕，每天游手好闲、惹是生非，自私自利，一点都不知道为社会贡献价值！
t_en: You fear for nothing just because you're young and energetic. You idle away your time every day, going around stirring up trouble! You contribute nothing to society!

t_ch: 像你这样无视规则的小屁孩，我要修正你——上吧，美梦剧团！给我狠狠地教训{M#他们}{F#她们}！
t_en: Let me help you spoiled brats learn the hard way. Go, Sweet Dreams Troupe! Teach them a lesson!

t_ch: 可恶，我竟然输了…这就是…青春的力量吗……
t_en: Darn it, I can't believe I've lost... Is this the power of youth...

t_ch: 如果那时我也有这种力量，米娅…我们是不是就能有个不一样的结局？
t_en: If I'd had that power back then, would we have ended up differently, Meeya?

t_ch: 你们走吧。胜者的权利，尽情享用吧……
t_en: Alright, you can go in. As the winner, you deserve it...

t_ch: 他是不是有点入戏了？但总算能过去了……
t_en: Seems like he's taking this winning and losing thing a little too seriously... Well, at least we finally get to go through...

t_ch: 它就在那里，永远散发着耀眼的光芒，就像这五光十色的美梦本身。
t_en: It radiates dazzling light perpetually, just like this glamorous dream.

t_ch: 我想，沐浴在光中的人，一定都会被那种温暖所吸引吧……
t_en: I suppose everyone who likes to bask in the light will be drawn to that kind of warmth...

t_ch: …就像无数追逐火焰的飞萤。
t_en: ...Like countless fireflies chasing the fire.

t_ch: 走吧，我们还剩一半路。
t_en: Let's go. Half the journey is still ahead of us.

t_ch: 可恶…到底是哪里出了问题？
t_en: Argh... What exactly went wrong?

t_ch: 是我太久没喝苏乐达了吗，还是因为连加了两个月的班——怎么偏偏今天没灵感了呢？
t_en: Is it because I've gone for too long without drinking SoulGlad, or because I've been working overtime for two months? Why don't I have any inspiration today?

t_ch: 你看起来很困扰…
t_en: You seem distressed...

t_ch: 能把拼图碎片给我吗？
t_en: Can I have the puzzle piece?

t_ch: 朋友，别卷了。
t_en: Give yourself a break, mate.

t_ch: …什么人？！
t_en: ...Who's there!?

t_ch: 哪来的游客…我不管你们怎么溜进来的，现在别烦我——要是我没法按时交付，准没你们好果子吃！
t_en: Why are there guests here... You know what, I don't care how you snuck in, just leave me alone. If you prevent me from finishing my work on time, I'm going to make you pay for it!

t_ch: 尝试洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts.

t_ch: 不打扰你了。
t_en: I won't bother you.

t_ch: 一边去一边去，让我一个人静静！
t_en: Haul yourselves over to somewhere else! I need to be alone!

t_ch: 看来你得想办法让这位筑梦师<color=#dbc291ff>振作</color>起来了。
t_en: It seems you need to find a way to <color=#dbc291ff>uplift</color> the Dreamweaver.

t_ch: 唉…究竟是为什么呢？
t_en: Alas... Why did I do that?

t_ch: 如果二十年前没签那份合约，我已经是艾斯克兰贡最顶尖的建筑师了……
t_en: If I hadn't signed that agreement <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago, I'd have been the top architect in Esclaragon by now...

t_ch: 二十年前的我究竟是吃错了什么药，才会做出这么愚蠢的决定，来阿斯德纳这种偏远星系，为该死的家族搬砖卖命？
t_en: Was I under some kind of spell <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago when I made that foolish decision to work for The Family on some far-flung planet in the Asdana system?

t_ch: 我真傻…早知如此，怎会落得现在这般下场？
t_en: I was so foolish back then... If I had known better, I wouldn't have ended up in such a miserable position.

t_ch: 连加两个月班，连一口苏乐达都喝不上，整天对着这片该死的梦境犯难，还要思考自己会不会被「优化」……
t_en: I've been working overtime for two months straight, without enjoying a single sip of SoulGlad. I spend every day staring at this godforsaken Dreamscape with anxiety, and I also have to worry about the possibility of being replaced...

t_ch: 唉…我怎么就成了这副德行呢？
t_en: Alas... How did I end up like this?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你好像把他弄抑郁了……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I think you've made him depressed...

t_ch: 尝试洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts.

t_ch: 你平息了筑梦师的愤怒——但导向了错误的方向。或许你应该换个方向再试试。
t_en: You have calmed the Dreamweaver's fury but directed it in the wrong direction. Perhaps you should try a different approach.

t_ch: 嗯…就这样吧。再挣扎下去也无济于事。
t_en: Well... I'm going to leave things as they are. Getting upset about it won't help anything.

t_ch: 罢了罢了，不想了。还是琢磨下班后吃点什么好吧，好歹让那点破苜蓿币有机会发光发热。
t_en: Fine, I'm going to stop dwelling on it. I should probably be thinking about something productive, like what to eat after work. At least that will put my lousy Alfalfa coins to some use.

t_ch: 苜蓿币、苜蓿币…该死的钟表小子！整天只会扮出一张傻兮兮的笑脸，逗那些不知匹诺康尼水深火热的观光客咯咯大笑，再骗他们像我一样留在这做牛做马……
t_en: Alfalfa coins, Alfalfa coins... Huh, that Clockie guy is a real piece of work! All he does is put on that goofy smile to crack up those ignorant guests and hoodwink people like me into working like a dog here...

t_ch: 做牛做马…这么说来，匹诺康尼有这种生物吗？感觉从没见过啊——牛也没有，马也没有…喔不对——我不就是牛马吗，这下破案了！
t_en: Dog... Are there even dogs in Penacony? I don't think I've ever seen one... Wait a minute... Aren't I a dog myself? Case solved!

t_ch: 他的思维真发散…这就是艺术家吗？
t_en: His thinking is very spontaneous... Is this typical of artists?

t_ch: 尝试洞察他的内心。
t_en: Try reading his inner thoughts.

t_ch: 筑梦师变得十分平静。但对于艺术家来说，「平静」实在是有点索然无味——也许你得进一步刺激他才能让灵感的火花闪现。
t_en: The Dreamweaver has calmed down. However, "calm" could be dull for an artist. Maybe you need to stimulate him further to ignite the spark of inspiration.

t_ch: 这个约会场合很棒吧？
t_en: This is a great spot for a date, huh?

t_ch: 真不愧是你！
t_en: That's impressive!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你瞧，我没骗你吧——这个约会场合是不是很棒？你看嘛，这周围的景色是不是很迷人？
t_en: Haha, you see! I told you this would be a great spot for a date, right? Check it out? Isn't the view enchanting?

t_ch: 真不愧是你，好点子真多！这里的视野真好，整个黄金的时刻都尽收眼底……
t_en: That's impressive! Got a lot of good ideas, you do! This place has a great view, and you can see all of the Golden Hour from here...

t_ch: …不过咱们一会儿该怎么离开呢？不会又要爬一次通风管道吧？
t_en: ...Though, how are we going to leave? We're not climbing the ventilation ducts again, are we?

t_ch: 呃，这个…嗐，总会有办法的！先别想那么多了，还是先享受当下吧！
t_en: Argh. That... well, there's got to be a way! Don't think about that much stuff. Let's enjoy what we've got now first!

t_ch: 哈，有了！一个绝妙的点子！让我找张纸记下来……
t_en: Ah-ha, I've got it! What a brilliant idea it is! I must write it down on paper while it's fresh in my mind...

t_ch: …不行不行，等我蒙头睡一觉，醒来铁定又忘了。心动不如行动，干脆现在就把它复现出来！
t_en: ...No, no, no. I'm sure I'll forget all the details when I wake up from sleep. There's no better time than now to put it into action!

t_ch: 他自顾自走了…但留下了拼图碎片。
t_en: He wandered off, but he left behind the puzzle piece.

t_ch: 呃，我记得这里上次还没有看守的…是我出入太多引起注意了？
t_en: Um, this area wasn't guarded the last time I was here... Have my frequent comings and goings started drawing attention?

t_ch: …好像绕不开，只能把它们敲晕了……
t_en: ...I don't think we can get around them. Knocking them out is the only way to go...

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 这根球棒终于有用了。
t_en: At long last, this baseball bat of mine has found its purpose.

t_ch: 那，我们上吧——把它们赶跑！
t_en: Let's get rid of them!

t_ch: 气氛突然变得好沉重，抱歉，不该这样的…让我想想，怎么活跃气氛比较好？
t_en: I'm sorry things are getting all bleak and serious... Let me see what I can do to lighten the mood.

t_ch: 对了——你在列车上有很多朋友。你们平时遇到这种状况，是怎么做的？
t_en: I mean, don't you have lots of friends on the Astral Express? What would you guys do if something like this happened?

t_ch: 帕姆会用喷壶让我们冷静一下…
t_en: Pom-Pom would cool us down with water from a spray can...

t_ch: 喷壶？这也太…直接了。
t_en: Spray can? That's... rough.

t_ch: 或许…我们还有其他选择？
t_en: Perhaps, there's something else we can do?

t_ch: 丹恒会一本正经地讲冷笑话…
t_en: Dan Heng would tell us dry jokes with a deadpan expression...

t_ch: 讲笑话？啊，我…没什么幽默感……
t_en: Jokes? Um, I... don't really have a good sense of humor...

t_ch: 也许…我们可以想想其他办法？
t_en: Perhaps, we can think of another way?

t_ch: 姬子会给我们泡杯咖啡…
t_en: Himeko would make coffee for us...

t_ch: 咖啡…当下好像也没有这个条件……
t_en: Coffee... We can't really make that here...

t_ch: 我们…应该还可以参考其他人的做法？
t_en: Aren't there... other Crew members we can take inspiration from?

t_ch: 杨叔会想办法转移话题…
t_en: Mr. Yang would try to change the subject...

t_ch: 我…我已经在想办法转移话题了……
t_en: I... have been trying to do that...

t_ch: …但我失败了。也许…你们还有其他办法？
t_en: ...But I think I failed. Maybe... there are other things that you guys do?

t_ch: 三月会拉着我们一起自拍…
t_en: March would force us to take a selfie with her...

t_ch: 自拍，自拍…你说得对，我来这里好多次了，怎么没想到拍张照呢？
t_en: Selfie, selfie... You're right. I've been here so many times. Why didn't I think of taking a photo?

t_ch: 不过对着自己一个人…总有些不习惯。要一起吗？就当是留个纪念。
t_en: I feel a little awkward taking it by myself. Would you like to join me? Let's commemorate this moment.

t_ch: 好啊。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 好吵…声音…越来越刺耳了……
t_en: So loud... the voice... It's becoming more shrill...

t_ch: 电视机的闪光好刺眼…小心，好像有什么东西……
t_en: The TVs are so bright, it's hurting my eyes... Careful, something's up...

t_ch: 不可思议…真的就像梦里才能看见的风景……
t_en: Incredible... This is really a sight that can only be witnessed in a dream...

t_ch: 从刚才开始，这些文字就不停地浮现、消失，它们是谁的心声吗？「米哈伊尔」又是谁……
t_en: These words have been appearing and then vanishing persistently for awhile now. Whose thoughts are they? And who is this Mikhail...

t_ch: 有点吓人…
t_en: It's kinda scary...

t_ch: 有种悲伤的感觉…
t_en: There is a sadness to this...

t_ch: 米哈伊尔…好像在哪听过……
t_en: Mikhail... Where have I heard this name...

t_ch: 我好像能感受到其中蕴含的…情绪。迷茫…畏惧…悲伤…以及微弱到几乎无法感知的……
t_en: It's like I can feel... emotions contained within them. Confusion... fear... sadness... and others so faint I can barely feel them...

t_ch: 视死如归的决心……
t_en: Unyielding resolve in the face of death...

t_ch: 呃…只有一个宝箱？好可疑，要打开看看吗……
t_en: Er... Just one chest? I'm sure that's not a trap. Should we open it...?

t_ch: …怎么回事？！灯怎么全都亮起来了，好吓人……
t_en: ...What's going on!? The lights have all turned on. So creepy...

t_ch: 不过，这里居然有这么多扇门…我们应该能从其中一扇离开这里吧……
t_en: But, since there are so many doors here... we should be able to leave through one of them...

t_ch: 这、这是什么怪物啊——
t_en: Wh—What is this monster...

t_ch: 它和一路上遇到的那些好像…这些怪物就是家族在隐瞒的秘密？
t_en: This Monster—— all these creatures——are they the secret The Family is hiding?

t_ch: 唔，就没有办法摆脱它吗…？！
t_en: Ugh, is there no way to lose it...!?

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 放轻松，小妹妹，我是站在你们这边的哦。
t_en: Easy, girl. I'm on your side.

t_ch: 不如这么称呼我吧…「忆者」黑天鹅。
t_en: You can call me... the Memokeeper, Black Swan.

t_ch: 你醒了啊，小瞌睡虫。看来你做了个好梦。
t_en: You're awake, lazy bug. Looks like you had a nice dream.

t_ch: 如何，有梦到我吗？
t_en: How was it? Did you dream of me?

t_ch: 是你救了我们？
t_en: Did you save us?

t_ch: 我只是帮你们离开了那片忆域，仅此而已。
t_en: I didn't do much, just helped you leave the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 我还活着吗…
t_en: Am I still alive...?

t_ch: 这里是天堂吗…
t_en: Are we in Heaven... Or?

t_ch: 欢迎来到现实——白日梦酒店——你最熟悉，也是最安全的地方。
t_en: Welcome to reality. More specifically, The Reverie, the safest and most familiar place you can be.

t_ch: 很高兴你的精神状态还算正常，没有受到那片*原始梦境*的影响，运气不错。
t_en: I'm happy to see that you've kept your wits, and that you haven't been affected by the *Primal Dreamscape*. How lucky.
